message:
build: add vergen build script for compile-time metadata

Uses vergen-gix to inject build metadata at compile time:
- Build timestamp and target
- Cargo features and profile
- Git commit SHA, branch, dirty flag
- Rustc version and channel

This enables runtime access to build provenance via
environment variables (VERGEN_*) for debugging and
version reporting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
